nwtc_callees.notes: Called via the Failed() contained function inside AD_CalcOutput (line 2223); defined at NWTC_Base.f90:92
Called inside Failed() of RotCalcOutput (depth-1 callee at line 2189) and inside Failed() of AD_CalcWind (depth-1 callee at line 2184)

integration_map.change: Add 'typedef ^ RotParameterType ReKi BladeLoadCorrFactor - - - "Blade load correction factor" -' inside the RotParameterType block; re-run the Registry tool to regenerate AeroDyn_Types.f90
Regenerated output from Registry: RotParameterType gains the BladeLoadCorrFactor ReKi field; no manual edits — always re-run Registry after touching AeroDyn_Registry.txt
In the subroutine that populates RotParameterType from the AeroDyn input file, read BladeLoadCorrFactor from the input deck (or default to 1.0_ReKi) and assign to p%rotors(iR)%BladeLoadCorrFactor

In SetOutputsFromBEMT (subroutine at line 4068), multiply the assembled blade force and moment vectors by p%BladeLoadCorrFactor immediately after the dimensionalisation block (~lines 4100-4106), before results are transferred to the output mesh

At the AD_Init call site inside FAST_InitializeAll (line 716), if BladeLoadCorrFactor is driven from the top-level FAST primary input rather than the AeroDyn deck, populate Init%InData_AD with the value before this call; no change needed if the parameter is read entirely within AD_Init from the AeroDyn input file
